title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on how AGI economics challenges conventional intuitions about capital share, wealth concentration, and optimal tax policy. The episode examines scenarios where AI productivity gains paradoxically shrink AI's economic share, and discusses redistribution mechanisms for both developed and developing nations.
